title: bstack workspaces registry v1
description: Schema for ~/.broomva/global/registry.yaml — the opt-in registry of bstack-governed workspaces on this host. Federation is read-only aggregation; each workspace owns its own state.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last write to this file. Updated on every register / deregister.

name.description: Human-readable identifier (defaults to basename of `path`). Must be unique within the registry.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the workspace root.

bstack_version.description: bstack version recorded at registration / last refresh.

registered_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this workspace was first registered.

last_seen_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful aggregate query.
